ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie's director */,
  "num_critic_for_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of critic reviews for the movie */,
  "gross" REAL /* Gross revenue of the movie */,
  "genres" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of movie genres */,
  "actor_1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first lead actor */,
  "movie_title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "num_voted_users" INTEGER /* Number of users who voted for the movie */,
  "num_user_for_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of user reviews for the movie */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the language of the movie */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget of the movie */,
  "title_year" INTEGER /* Year the movie was released */,
  "imdb_score" REAL /* IMDb score of the movie */,
  "movie_facebook_likes" INTEGER /* Number of Facebook likes for the movie */,
  "profit" TEXT /* Profit of the movie */,
  "genre_1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first genre of the movie */,
  "genre_2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second genre of the movie */,
  "decade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the decade the movie was released in */,
  "production_company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production company */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the movie's production */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "age_rating" TEXT /* Age rating of the movie */,
  "trailer_views" INTEGER /* Number of views on the movie trailer */,
  "social_media_engagement" INTEGER /* Overall engagement on social media (likes, shares, comments) */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Awards won by the movie */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the movie was released in theaters */,
  "distributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie's distributor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_genre_1_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_1_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_actor_1_id FOREIGN KEY ("actor_1_id") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_genre_2_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_2_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_decade_id FOREIGN KEY ("decade_id") REFERENCES decades ("decade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Full name of the director */,
  "num_movies_directed" INTEGER /* Number of movies directed by the director */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the director */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Awards won by the director */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the director */,
  "social_media_handle" TEXT /* Social media handle of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the actor */,
  "num_movies_acted_in" INTEGER /* Number of movies the actor has acted in */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the actor */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Awards won by the actor */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the actor */,
  "social_media_handle" TEXT /* Social media handle of the actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "decades" (
  "decade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each decade */,
  "decade_name" TEXT /* Name of the decade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("decade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "critic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the critic who wrote the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given to the movie */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes on the review */,
  "dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes on the review */,
  "report_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the review has been reported */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is verified */,
  "spoiler" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review contains spoilers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_critic_id FOREIGN KEY ("critic_id") REFERENCES critics ("critic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., critic, regular user) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Date the user was last active */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  "following" INTEGER /* Number of users the user is following */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "critics" (
  "critic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each critic */,
  "critic_name" TEXT /* Full name of the critic */,
  "publication" TEXT /* Publication the critic writes for */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the critic joined the platform */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Date the critic was last active */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the critic's profile picture */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers the critic has */,
  "following" INTEGER /* Number of users the critic is following */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("critic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_actors" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "actor_id")
)
